name: Software Licensing & Asset Management
description: Software procurement, license management, and compliance services across all major publishers. Bechtle helps customers optimize their software estate, manage license agreements (EA, CSP, MPSA), and maintain compliance through ongoing software asset management.
target_audience: IT procurement, software asset managers, CFOs
differentiators: Deep licensing expertise across complex enterprise agreements
Software asset management (SAM) to optimize spend and compliance
Automated procurement portal for volume customers
